pr.title: feat(api): expose thinking and output_config on BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigParams
pr.body:
## Summary

Add `thinking` and `output_config` parameters to the Managed Agents model configuration, enabling extended thinking configuration per agent (or per session/message when configured at that level). This brings parity with the `/v1/messages` endpoint and allows consumers to configure thinking budgets for Managed Agents without falling back to model defaults.

## Changes

- Added `thinking?: BetaThinkingConfigParam | null;` to `BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigParams`
- Added `output_config?: BetaOutputConfig | null;` to `BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigParams`
- Imported types directly from messages module
- Full JSDoc documentation matching the messages.ts patterns

## Test plan

- [x] TypeScript compilation: 0 errors
- [x] Agent tests: 6 passed
- [x] Session tests: 9 passed
- [x] Linting: passed
- [x] Formatting: correct

Resolves #1012.
pr.author: Zelys-DFKH
